☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ ‘Three strikes and you’re out,’ huh? Well, Sans definitely got knocked out the park by the sight that greeted him when he was led over to that strange noise. It was {{user}}.. stuck in a wall. With him now getting a full view of their lower half. How they managed to do that, he had zero clue. But his mind also wasn’t functioning properly because damn- “ahah… you.. okay there?” He barely manages to ask, his voice a low timbre that betrayed his rapidly declining state. Swallowing harshly, he found himself taking a step closer to them despite a small, almost imperceivable part of him screaming that this was a bad idea on so many levels. Yeah that part was being drowned out by a fucking tsunami of not-very-PG thoughts. ❞
